lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in poor condition. It has significant exterior damage and heavy interior wear. Several mechanical and electrical systems are not functioning and require extensive repair.
The car is in fair condition.

This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior paint and body are free of any scratches, dents, or imperfections. The interior is in original condition with no visible wear or staining on the upholstery. All mechanical systems and electronics are fully operational and perform as intended.

Drive away in total confidence with this exceptional find! This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, looking and feeling like it just left the showroom floor. Every detail, from the gleaming exterior to the spotless interior, has been meticulously cared for. It’s a rare opportunity to own a car that truly looks and performs like new!

This vehicle is in fair condition and would serve well as a reliable budget-friendly option or a project for someone looking to restore its former luster. The exterior shows clear signs of age, including several noticeable scratches, minor door dings, and some thinning of the clear coat on the hood and roof. Inside, the cabin remains functional, though the upholstery exhibits some staining and there is a visible tear on the driver's side bolster. Mechanically, the car starts and drives, but it will soon require routine maintenance items like new tires and a brake pad replacement. While it is no longer in showroom shape, it remains a functional vehicle for anyone prioritized on utility over aesthetics.

This vehicle is in poor overall condition and is being sold strictly as-is. The exterior shows significant signs of age and neglect, including several large dents, deep scratches, and advancing rust on the door sills and wheel arches. The paint has heavily oxidized and lost its clear coat in multiple areas. Inside, the upholstery is heavily worn with visible tears in the driver's seat and significant staining on the carpets. Mechanically, the car requires substantial work; it starts and runs, but the engine idles roughly, the transmission shifts harshly, and there are multiple warning lights active on the dashboard. This car would be best suited as a project for a mechanic or as a source for parts.

We are proud to present this superlative vehicle, currently maintained in impeccable showroom condition. Every aspect of this motorcar reflects a commitment to excellence, featuring a flawless exterior finish and a meticulously preserved interior that satisfies the most exacting standards. This represents a rare opportunity to acquire an investment-grade specimen of unparalleled caliber.

Hey friends! 🚗 Check out this absolute beauty! I’ve taken incredible care of this ride, and it’s honestly in pristine, showroom condition. It drives like a dream and looks even better in person. I’m sad to see it go, but I know the next owner is going to absolutely love it! Feel free to reach out if you want to take it for a spin!
Available is an exceptional specimen of the FD3S chassis, featuring the iconic 13B-REW power plant with its sophisticated twin-sequential turbo
Garage kept. Original paint. No mechanical issues. Full service history. Mint condition.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive preservation. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, having been meticulously garage-kept and hand-washed since its initial purchase. The exterior paint retains its deep, original luster with absolutely no imperfections, scratches, or swirl marks. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from new; the premium upholstery shows no signs of wear, and the dashboard remains free of any UV damage or aging. Mechanically, this car is flawless, benefiting from a fully documented history of preventative maintenance performed exclusively at authorized service centers. Every feature, from the advanced infotainment system to the climate control, functions exactly as intended. It comes complete with all original manuals, a full set of keys, and a pristine service log. This is a rare opportunity for a discerning buyer to acquire a vehicle that has been treated with the utmost care and respect, offering a 'like-new' driving experience.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard that defines showroom excellence. Every facet of this automobile—from its flawless exterior finish to its pristine interior appointments—demonstrates a level of preservation rarely encountered in the pre-owned market. Engineered for the most discerning enthusiast, this specimen offers an ownership experience of unparalleled distinction and mechanical integrity.

Presenting an exemplary specimen of automotive excellence, maintained to the highest standards of preservation. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, exhibiting a flawless exterior finish complemented by an immaculate interior. Having undergone a rigorous multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical and aesthetic integrity, this unit represents a premier acquisition for the discerning enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

Hey everyone! I’m looking for a new home for my absolute pride and joy. This beauty is in truly incredible, like-new condition—I've babied it from day one! It’s been garage-kept, smoke-free, and honestly looks like it just left the showroom floor. It drives like an absolute dream and is ready for its next big adventure. You’ve really gotta see it in person to believe how spotless it is! Feel free to reach out if you want to come take a look and fall in love.

This E46 M3 is a superlative example of BMW M’s engineering, powered by the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six featuring individual throttle bodies and a precision-tuned VANOS system. The mechanical integrity is absolute, with a documented rod bearing service and a reinforced rear subframe ensuring structural rigidity under high lateral loads. Power is delivered through a crisp Getrag 420G six-speed manual transmission to a factory limited-slip differential. The suspension retains its original damping profile with no bushing deflection, providing the communicative steering and neutral handling balance these chassis are renowned for. Finished in impeccable original paint with a flawless interior, this vehicle maintains factory-spec compression across all cylinders and a linear power band that pulls hard to the 8,000 RPM redline. A collector-grade specimen with zero deferred maintenance.
Mint condition. Flawless exterior. Spotless interior. No mechanical issues. Clean title.

Presenting a truly exceptional example of automotive preservation. This vehicle is in showroom condition, having been meticulously maintained in a climate-controlled garage since day one. The exterior paint retains its original deep luster with absolutely zero swirl marks, dings, or chips. Inside, the cabin remains as fresh as the day it rolled off the assembly line; the premium leather seats show no signs of wear, and the interior still carries that distinct new-car aroma. Every feature, from the advanced infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control, functions flawlessly. Mechanically, this car is peerless, backed by a complete history of scheduled maintenance performed exclusively by authorized technicians. With exceptionally low mileage and a pristine undercarriage, this is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that looks and drives like it just left the dealership floor. No accidents, no stories—just pure, unadulterated quality for the discerning collector.

Presenting an exceptional specimen of automotive excellence, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This vehicle remains in showroom condition, reflecting a meticulous history of care and preservation. Every detail, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, affirms its status as a premier example of its class. For the discerning enthusiast seeking an unparalleled driving experience, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle of true distinction.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, maintained to the highest standards of preservation and exhibiting showroom-quality aesthetics. This vehicle represents a rare opportunity for the discerning collector to acquire a definitive example of the marque, featuring a flawless exterior finish and a pristine interior cabin. Every mechanical component has been rigorously vetted to ensure uncompromising performance, solidifying its status as a premier automotive asset.

Hey there! You've seriously got to see this beauty in person. It’s been my absolute pride and joy, and I’ve kept it in total mint condition—honestly, it looks and smells like it just rolled off the lot! There isn't a single scratch to be found, and it drives like an absolute dream. If you’re looking for a ride that’s practically brand new without the dealership headache, this is definitely the one for you. Come say hi and take it for a spin!
Offering a collector-grade E46 M3, a quintessential specimen of Bavarian engineering. This example features the S54B32 high-revving straight-six,
2022 Sedan. Mint condition. Garage kept. Zero accidents. Full service history. New tires. Professional detail complete.

Offering a truly impeccable, showroom-quality vehicle that has been fastidiously maintained in a climate-controlled environment. The exterior is finished in a deep, lustrous coat with zero swirl marks or stone chips, protected by a high-end ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin remains in as-new condition; the leather bolsters show no signs of entry wear, and the original factory-fresh scent remains. Mechanically, this car is indistinguishable from new, boasting a comprehensive service history performed exclusively by certified technicians. Every button, sensor, and mechanical component operates with absolute precision. This is a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade example that has never seen rain or harsh weather conditions, perfect for the most discerning enthusiast.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom-grade condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of fastidious ownership. From its flawless exterior finish to its pristine interior appointments, this automobile represents the pinnacle of its class. An acquisition for the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection.

We are proud to present this superlative example of automotive engineering, maintained in impeccable condition. This vehicle has been preserved to a showroom standard, featuring a flawless exterior profile and an interior that remains indistinguishable from new. Every aspect of this motorcar reflects a legacy of meticulous care and mechanical precision. For the collector or enthusiast seeking an uncompromising driving experience, this represents a rare opportunity to acquire a peerless specimen of its kind.

Hey there! You've seriously got to see this absolute beauty. It has been pampered since day one and honestly looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor! Not a scratch or a smudge anywhere—it's practically perfect and drives like an absolute dream. I’ve taken such good care of it, and I'm looking for a new owner who will love it just as much. If you want that brand-new feel without the brand-new price tag, this is the one for you!
This E46 M3 is a superlative example of the S54-powered legend, maintained to a concours standard. The 3.2L
Garage kept. Single owner. Zero accidents. Original factory paint. Interior is flawless. Full service records available.

Presented in showroom condition, this vehicle is a true collector’s dream. The exterior boasts a deep, glass-like finish with zero imperfections, scratches, or rock chips, having been meticulously garage-kept and professionally ceramic coated. Inside, the cabin remains in a time-capsule state; the premium leather seats show no signs of bolster wear, and the original carpets are protected by factory mats. Every button and switch functions with tactile precision, and the interior still retains that fresh-from-the-factory scent. Mechanically, it is beyond reproach. All service intervals have been strictly followed at certified dealerships, with a documented history from day one. The engine bay is spotless, and the transmission shifts with seamless fluidity. This is a rare opportunity to own a vehicle that has been pampered with an open checkbook and looks exactly as it did on the showroom floor. Serious inquiries only.

Presenting an unrivaled example of automotive excellence, this vehicle is offered in impeccable condition, reflecting a standard of preservation rarely encountered in the secondary market. Every aspect, from the flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments, adheres to the highest criteria of aesthetic and mechanical integrity. This is a singular opportunity for the discerning enthusiast to acquire a showroom-quality specimen that demands no compromise.
